solutions.title: Check physical/WAN connection
steps: Check link LED on WAN port
Try a different cable or port

solutions.title: Check gateway reachability
steps: If unreachable, check ISP or upstream device

patterns.title: Interface is down
patterns.description: A network interface is not in the expected up state

solutions.title: Check interface configuration
steps: Verify interface exists in system config
Check if interface is disabled in firmware

patterns.title: Interface has no IP address
patterns.description: Interface is up but has no assigned IP

solutions.title: Assign static IP
steps: Add default route if needed: route.add destination=0.0.0.0/0 gateway=192.168.1.1

patterns.title: DNS resolution failure
patterns.description: Hostnames cannot be resolved to IP addresses

solutions.title: Check DNS server configuration
steps: Run: dns.status to see current resolvers
Verify DNS servers are reachable (ping them)

patterns.title: Missing default gateway
patterns.description: No default route configured for external access

solutions.title: Add default route via DHCP
steps: Restart interface to request new lease: ip.set interface=wan source=dhcp

solutions.title: Manually add default route
steps: Determine gateway IP from ISP or upstream network

patterns.title: Wi-Fi not connected
patterns.description: Wireless interface is down or not associated

solutions.title: Check Wi-Fi interface state
steps: Run: wifi.status to see current state
If down: enable wireless in system config

patterns.title: DHCP pool exhausted
patterns.description: DHCP server has no available addresses to assign

solutions.title: Check active leases
steps: Run: dhcp.leases to see current assignments

solutions.title: Expand DHCP pool
steps: Increase the DHCP range in DHCP server config
Restart DHCP service to apply changes

patterns.title: High latency or packet loss
patterns.description: Network is slow or dropping packets

solutions.title: Check interface errors
steps: Run: interface.status and check error/drop counters
High errors suggest physical layer issues (cable, duplex mismatch)

solutions.title: Check bandwidth usage
steps: Run: network.connections to see active connections

solutions.title: Test with different cable/port
steps: Try a different port on the switch
